HGSS.618.0000:
...You have strayed far...
Here I have meditated. Inside me,\r
a new power has been awakened.\f
Let me share my power with your
Pokémon. Take this, child.\f
HGSS.618.0002:
Do you see it? It is Hidden Power!\f
It draws out the power of Pokémon
for attacking.\f
Remember this: its type and power
depend on the Pokémon using it.
HGSS.618.0003: You have no room for it...
